raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un teem buhß mannus
Kaudis mahziht to Starpibu
starp to Swehtu un Nefiwehtu/
un teem Sinnamu darriht to
Starpibu starp Neschkihſtu un
Schkihſtu:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pahr weenu Teefas
Zeetu buhß teem stahweht un tee-
aht/ pehz mannahm Teefahm
buhß teem teefaht/ un teem buhß
mannas Bauslibaß un mannuß
Eiﬀkumus wiſſos mannuß eezel-
tös Swehtköß turreht/un man-
nas Swehdeenas fwehtiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir neweenam no teem
buhß pee kahda mirruſcha Bilwe-
a eet/ ka tas ne tohp neſchkihſts/
et pahr Tehwu un pahr Mahti/
eb pahr weenu Dehlu jeb Mei-
u/ pahr weenu Brahti jeb Mah-
u/ kaß ne irr pee Wihra bijusi/
varrehß tee tagahniteeß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pehz winna Schkih-
ischcanas taps winnam ſepti-
nas Deenas lihdſinatas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Untai Deenâ/ kad wiſch-
wehta Weetâ ee-eeß/ eekſcheja
Bagaimja fwehta Weetâ kal-
oht/ tad buhß tam farvu Greh-
u-Uppuri uppureht/ ſakka tai
Ungs KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas buhß teim par
weenu Eemantofchanu/ Es efmu
piann Eemantofchana/ tapehz
ims ne buhß teim nekahdu fewis-
ihpachunn doht eekſch Israë-
/Es efimu winno Ihpachums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "To Ehdamo-Uppuri/ un
to Grehku-Uppuri/ un to Nosee-
diwas Uppuri buhs teem ehſt/
un wiſſas Apfohlischanas eekſch
Israëta teem peederreheß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Pirmajee wiſſu
pirmu Augſtu no wiſſa/ un wiſſi
juhu Pazelfchanas-Uppuri/ pee-
derreheß teem Preestereem. Ir
tohß Pirmajue juhfas Mihelas
buhß jums tam Preestexam
doht/ ka ta Swehtſchana us ta-
wu Nammu paleeß.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne kahdu Maitu jeb
Saplohfitu no Putneem/ jeb no
Lohpeem buhß teem Preestereem
ehſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XLV. Nodalla.
Tai Modallischanai tahß Semmes buhs tä
isdallitai tapt : 1. Ka weens Semmes Gab-
bals preekſch tahß fwehtas Weetas un to
Preestexu Oſhwokteem : 2. Tas ohtrß
Semmes Gabbals preekſch teem Lewiteem :
5. Tas treschajß preekſch teem Kaudiu un
Pilſſahta : 6. Tas zettortajs preekſch teem
Leel : Rungeem atſchkirts tohp : 7. Teem
Leel Rungeem buhß Teefu un Taſfnibu dar-
riht : 9. No Pazelschanaß Uppureem /
Schkihſſchcanas tahß fwehtas Weetas/ no
teem Paſſa Swehtkeem un zitteem Sweht-
keem : 13. rc.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad juhe nu to Semmi
Epar Eemantofchanu is-
Dallifeet/ tad buhs jums
tam KUNGAM weenu Pazels-
chanas-Uppuri uppureht / par
weenu fwehtu Weetu no tahß
Semmes / diwideſmits un pee-
zas tuhkſtochas mehraima Rihe-
ſtes tas Garrums / un deſmits
tuhkſtochas tas Plattums / ta
buhß weena fwehta Weeta wiſ-
fäs farväß Eſchäß apkahrt.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
